title: MSC India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: MSC India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the MSC India family as a Warehouse Manager in Vijayawada. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About MSC India:
MSC India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MSC India!
